steps.title: Read the graph trend
steps.content: The graph shows a steep decline in the percentage of congressional members with military experience in both chambers from 1973 to 2013, from roughly three quarters to under one fifth.

steps.title: Reject inaccurate time spans
steps.content:
• Choice A: The House was not consistently higher than the Senate from 2003 to 2023.
  • Choice B: Veterans did not remain a majority in both houses through 2003.
  • Choice D: The percentages did not stay fairly consistent from 1993 to 2023.

steps.title: Use the steep shared decline
steps.content: The statement that both houses saw a substantial percentage decrease from 1973 to 2013 accurately captures the graph's clearest trend. The answer is C.
